positive: A minimalist, highly detailed illustration of a bioluminescent forest scene at twilight. The main subject is a stylized deer with glowing antlers, standing in a circle of gigantic, stylized mushrooms and delicate ferns. The composition is centered and vertically dynamic. Use a limited color palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, glowing cyan, and soft emerald green. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and clean vector art, with clean, thick outlines and sharp contrasts. Emphasize strong, clean silhouettes against a dark, moody background, perfect for screen printing on fabric. Focus on symmetrical composition and high visual impact.
negative: blurry, deformed, low resolution, artifacts, watermark, signature, text, logo, writing, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, cartoon, photo, realistic, cinematic
